name: Transparent Ruse
description:
# Requirements

## Done

- [x] React + Vite + TypeScript frontend (BG default, EN optional)
- [x] Dark / light theme (system default + persistence; theme toggle as icon)
- [x] Navigation: dashboard vs submit signal; mobile hamburger; logo returns to dashboard
- [x] Signals list, status pie chart, signal detail modal, voting + priority by score
- [x] Submit form: title, description, neighborhood as **dropdown**, attachments (camera + files + drag & drop)
- [x] Remove **Submitter** field from UI (keep `submitter_name` in DB / backend compatible)
- [x] Submit button not stuck disabled by Turnstile UI state (validation on submit when Turnstile is enabled)
- [x] Neighborhood map (SVG): click to filter, status coloring, stats panel, “see all” list; removed “Русе” label and map gradient
- [x] Canonical neighborhood IDs + aliases for consistent naming / filtering
- [x] Communication timeline in signal modal (original, AI summary, “submitted to municipality” log; placeholders for municipality reply + AI review)
- [x] Supabase: schema migrations (signals, events, attachments bucket, voting, `neighborhood_id`)
- [x] Supabase Edge Functions: `intake` (moderation + summary + timeline seed + uploads), `vote`
- [x] Public function access: deploy with `--no-verify-jwt` for browser calls (document security follow-up)
- [x] Groq integration in `intake` (moderation JSON + summary)
- [x] GitHub Actions workflow for GitHub Pages + `VITE_BASE_PATH` support in Vite
- [x] README deployment notes (frontend secrets vs Supabase secrets)

## Remaining / follow-up

- [ ] **Turnstile end-to-end**: add `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY` (GitHub Actions secrets) + `TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY` (Supabase secrets); verify widget on production domain
- [ ] **Hardening**: revisit `--no-verify-jwt` (rate limits, shared secret header, or anon JWT-only paths) before public scale-up
- [ ] **Secrets hygiene**: rotate any keys/tokens that were shared in insecure channels
- [ ] **GitHub Pages after repo rename**: Change repo name and confirm `VITE_BASE_PATH` matches new repo URL (or `/` for custom domain) and Pages permissions are correct
- [ ] **Optional UX / product**: voting anti-abuse rules; active tab indicator in nav; filter non-neighborhood polygons from sidebar list only
- [ ] **Optional ops**: GitHub Action to deploy Supabase migrations/functions on merge; monitoring/alerts



## Acceptance criteria (v1 "public beta")

- [ ] Citizen can submit a signal from production UI and it appears in DB + list + map filters correctly
- [ ] Attachments upload works end-to-end on production
- [ ] Voting works on production without auth errors
- [ ] Summary per category
   - [ ] Number of requests (overall and neighbourhood)
   - [ ] Detailed description for every neighbourhood. If the problem is exactly the same then a single summary can be used and all neighbourhoods affected with a bullet point.
- [ ] Turnstile enabled on production domain with spam protection acceptable to real users
